_comment: exp_015 — GRPO pass 2. Three changes from exp_009: (1) start from exp_009 GRPO model not base, (2) fresh difficulty-v2 curriculum, (3) max_completion_length=4096 to fix exp_010 OOM. All other hyperparams held constant.
_curriculum_note: Pending DSMLP run — intermediate-difficulty prompts (1-3/4 correct) re-sampled from the exp_009 GRPO model via sample_difficulty_v2.py.
_ref_model_note: ref_model intentionally unset — TRL defaults ref=base_model=exp_009 GRPO, making this a true continuation. Do NOT override to base Thinking-2507 or it will pull the policy backward.

vllm._note: Kaggle inference config after training. Use cse151b-notebook with model_id set to the merged pass2 model.
